PATIENT_ID: TEST_AKI_CHRONIC_RRT_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-02-10 16:00:00

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-02-10 17:00:00
82 y.o. male with PMH of ESRD on hemodialysis Monday Wednesday Friday.
Maintenance hemodialysis three times weekly, chronic dialysis patient.
Presented with fever and hypotension. AKI on CKD suspected.

[LAB] 2026-02-10 16:30:00
Creatinine: 6.8 mg/dL (baseline 5.2 — chronic)
BUN: 92 mg/dL

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-02-11 08:00:00
Patient on maintenance hemodialysis MWF schedule.
Chronic hemodialysis via AV fistula left arm.
Long-term renal replacement therapy, ESRD requiring dialysis.
